Literacy & EdTech Consulting
for Schools and Educators

Support with science-of-reading implementation, multilingual learner strategies, and digital tool integration — from a 12+ year practitioner who builds the tools she recommends.

Who This Is For

Built for Educators Ready to Move Forward

Schools Improving Literacy Outcomes

You know your reading data needs to improve, but aligning curriculum, intervention, and instruction feels overwhelming.

Districts Aligning Assessments

Your assessments don't talk to each other. You need a coherent system that gives teachers actionable data — not just more testing.

Teachers Needing PD or Systems

You want practical professional development, better classroom workflows, or support integrating technology in ways that actually save time.

What I Help With

Practical Support, Not Packaged Programs

Every school and educator is different. I start by listening, then build a plan around your specific needs.

Literacy Systems Alignment

Audit and align your reading programs, intervention frameworks, and curriculum to ensure coherence across your school or district.

Teacher Training & PD

Hands-on professional development in structured literacy, Science of Reading practices, and multilingual learner strategies that teachers actually use.

Assessment Strategy

Design assessment systems that give you actionable data — from diagnostic screening to progress monitoring to standards alignment.

Instructional Technology Workflows

Strategic technology adoption that sticks. Tool selection, rollout planning, and sustainable integration for classrooms and schools.

Custom Digital Solutions

Need something built? From assessment tools to curriculum platforms, I design and develop EdTech solutions tailored to your specific challenges.

Framework Guides

Big-Picture Thinking for Your School

Implementation guides and evaluation frameworks for schools and districts working on systemic change.

Structured Literacy Implementation

A step-by-step guide for schools transitioning to a structured literacy approach, including timelines, training needs, and common pitfalls.

Read Guide

Assessment Alignment Framework

How to map your diagnostic, formative, and summative assessments to standards — and make sure they actually inform instruction.

Read Guide

EdTech Evaluation Rubric

A practical rubric for evaluating educational technology tools — accessibility, pedagogy alignment, data privacy, and teacher workload impact.

Read Guide

Multilingual Learner Support Guide

Strategies for supporting multilingual learners across content areas, including language scaffolds, cultural responsiveness, and family engagement.

Read Guide

Why Work With Me

A Practitioner Who Builds

12+ Years in Education

Classroom teacher, reading interventionist, literacy specialist, and curriculum designer. I've been in the roles I consult on.

Real Projects, Real Tools

I don't just advise — I build. From lesson libraries and teacher tools to full platforms, my consulting is grounded in real deliverables.

AssessAlign — Built From Practice

AssessAlign is a real product I designed and developed to solve assessment alignment challenges I saw across schools and districts. It's an example of how my consulting turns into action.

12+Years Experience
SoRCertified
100+Resources Built

Limited partnerships available

Let's Talk About What You Need

No packages, no pressure. Just a conversation about where you are and how I might help. If we're a good fit, we'll build a plan together.
